title: Here are 11 stocks Jim Cramer is watching, including Buffett's Berkshire and restaurant stocks
text: Here are some of the tickers on my radar for Friday, Sept. 29, taken directly from my reporter's notebook.

title: ResMed (RMD) Stock Jumps 3.8%: Will It Continue to Soar?
text: ResMed (RMD) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: Wall Street analysts expect the S&P 500 to rise 19% over the next 12 months. Here are their 10 favorite stocks.
text: Outside of a handful of highflying technology stocks, U.S. stocks have been practically flat in 2023, but on Wall Street, some analysts remain as bullish as ever.

title: ResMed (RMD) Gains From Mask Sales Amid Macro Headwinds
text: ResMed's (RMD) respiratory care business continues to drive growth, courtesy of the adoption of bilevel and other non-invasive ventilator solutions worldwide.

title: Analysts Predict A 19% Surge For The S&P 500 Soon — Lifted By 10 Stocks
text: It's been a rough half of the year for the S&P 500 — with it slipping nearly 3%. But that's not stopping analysts from bullish calls.

title: 3 Top Growth Stock Picks Trading at a Massive Bargain
text: With the market rallying hard lately, it's easy to think every stock is participating in the gains. But look a little closer, and you'll see the rally has been very narrow.

title: ResMed - Trading Opportunity Now
text: ResMed is the global leader in the sleep apnea market. Sales growth accelerated during COVID and again recently as a result of a product recall from its major competitor. Despite a strong last quarter the market has marked the stock down due to concerns about the long term loss of market to GLP-1 medications.

title: ResMed: Stock Re-Rating To 20x Forward P/E Is A Buy Opportunity
text: RMD is a buy as I expect that the market will re-evaluate the stock and return it to its historical average. Sales for ResMed in 4Q23 increased by 23% YoY, driven by device sales and unexpected growth in mask sales. Gross margin pressures persist, but I anticipate that gross margin will eventually catch up with revenue growth momentum.

title: Is It Time to Buy the S&P 500's 3 Worst-Performing August Stocks?
text: Insulet is seeing increasing price pressure in the insulin market ResMed missed estimates on the top and bottom lines. Investors balked at Tapestry's acquisition of Capri.

title: ResMed shares can overcome obesity-drug craze, analysts say
text: Shares of ResMed Inc. RMD, which have been pounded in recent weeks by concerns that the obesity-drug craze could hurt demand for the company's sleep therapy devices, are poised for a turnaround, according to Needham analysts. Although GLP-1 drugs, such as Novo Nordisk's NVO Ozempic and Wegovy, may cause some patients to stop using CPAP machines as their sleep apnea becomes less severe, “these impacts are likely to be small,” the analysts wrote in a note Wednesday, saying that ResMed can sustain 5% to 7% revenue growth and double-digit per-share earnings growth for the next few years.

title: ResMed Announces Participation in Upcoming Conferences
text: SAN DIEGO, Sept. 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ResMed (NYSE: RMD, ASX: RMD) today announced its participation in two upcoming conferences.

title: 3 Reasons ResMed's CEO Isn't Worried About Ozempic or Wegovy
text: Some investors in ResMed, which makes machines for people with sleep apnea, think that effective new weight-loss drugs could shrink its addressable market. On ResMed's latest earnings call, CEO Mick Farrell laid out three reasons why he doesn't think the company will feel any impact from those drugs.
